source_title: 02 Building Environments - The Basics/04 Material Instances - Texturing Our Environment

evidences.content: 现在，我们又回到了最开始的黑夜洞穴。 So now we're back in our dark night cave at the very beginning. 相信我，一旦开始运行，我们很快就能搞定。 Believe me, we're going to get through this pretty quickly once we get up and running. 但现在我们遇到了一个问题，我们可以看到我们的纹理，它很明显是横向平铺的。 But now we have this problem where we can see our texture and it's very clearly tiling across 我们的整个表面。因此，如果我们双击这个材质实例，就会出现 our entire surface. So if we double click this material instance, we're going to have 我们的材质实例设置。现在，我们滚动到底部。我们可以看到这里有一个 Megascans our material instance settings. Now we scroll to the bottom. We can see that this has a Megascans 表面材料模板。我喜欢做的一件事是将这些模板设置为平面 surface material template. And one thing I like to do is I like to set these either to a plane 或立方体。立方体可以让你看到每一面。如果我们看这里，可以看到 or a cube. Cube just lets you see each side individually. And if we look here, we can see 我们的对象正以非常完美的方式铺满整个地板。因此 that our object is tiling in a very perfect way across our entire floor. So the first thing that 我们可以做的就是改变全局平铺。所以平铺是 X 和 Y 的组合。 we can do is we'll want to change our global tiling. So tiling is an X and Y. If we just 拖动它，我们可以看到它向一个或另一个方向拉伸。所以，如果我把它调高一点、 drag this, we can see that it stretches it out in one direction or another. So if I set it higher, 就会更频繁。如果设置得低一些，贴瓷砖的频率就会低一些。 it's going to tile more frequently. If I set it lower, it's going to tile less frequently. 因此，一开始我就将 X 和 Y 设置为 0.25、 So off the bat, I'm going to set this to 0.25 in the X and the Y. And we can see that already, 这看起来好多了，尤其是当你从长长的走廊往下看的时候、 this looks quite a bit better, but especially when you're looking down long corridors, 你就会开始看到一些重复出现的情况。因此，避免 you can start to see some of that repeating over and over again. So a really simple way to avoid 在不进行任何复杂着色器数学运算的情况下，可以通过添加旋转角度来实现。因此旋转角度 this without doing any complicated shader math is by adding a rotation angle. So rotation angle 介于 0 和 1 之间，其中 0 表示 0，1 表示 360。因此，如果我将其设置为 1，它看起来就会像这样 is between 0 and 1, where 0 is 0 and 1 is 360. So if I set this to 1, it's going to look like 没有区别。如果我将其设置为 0.5，它就会旋转 180 度。因此，如果我将 there's no difference. If I set it to 0.5, it's going to do 180 degree rotation. So if I set this 到 0.25，就会旋转 90 度。但如果我们将其设置为一个偏离轴线的数字、 to 0.25, it'll be a 90 degree rotation. But if we set it on sort of an off axis number, 0.15，我们就会发现平铺的方式开始变得不一样了。如果我们将 something like 0.15, we can see that this starts to break up how this is tiled. If we rotate our 相机，我们就会开始看到同样的重复性平铺。但就像我说的，如果我们在一个长 camera, we'll start to see that same reoccurring tiling. But like I said, if we're in a long 走廊，有时这只是让我们开始的窍门。现在，我们已经把我们的 corridor, oftentimes this will do the trick just to get us started. Now that we've stretched our 材料，如果我们靠近我们的人体模型，我们可以看到我们的地面实际上是 material, if we get up close to our mannequin here, we can see that our ground is actually 分辨率很低。这是因为我们已经把它平铺了很多。让我们看看 pretty low res. And this is because now we've tiled it up a bunch. So let's take a look at how 来更新我们的纹理，并将它们从 2K 纹理转换为 4K 分辨率。任何 Quixel 资产 to update our textures and convert them from 2K textures up to 4K resolution. Any Quixel asset 您下载的软件后面会有一个七个字母的键。所以我们有 VLXLEIV。 you download is going to have a seven letter key at the back here. So we have VLXLEIV. 因此，如果我输入 VLXLEIV，然后按回车键，就会出现我们之前输入的精确曲面 So if I type this in, VLXLEIV, and I hit enter, this should bring up the exact surface we had 之前。所以，现在如果我点击这个，并想把它从中等质量更新为高质量、 before.
